# clearpass_extension_instance (Resource)

Manages a ClearPass Extension Instance. Extensions provide additional functionality to ClearPass by running in isolated containers.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `store_id` (String) ID from the extension store

### Optional

- `note` (String) A user note about the extension displayed in the UI
- `state` (String) Desired state of the extension. Valid values are 'stopped' or 'running'.

### Read-Only

- `about_href` (String) URL for the extension's documentation
- `description` (String) Description of the extension
- `has_config` (Boolean) Indicates that the extension has configuration settings
- `hostname` (String) Hostname assigned to the extension
- `icon_href` (String) URL for the extension's icon
- `id` (String) ID of the extension instance
- `install_time` (String) Time at which the extension was installed
- `internal_ip_address` (String) Internal IP address of the extension
- `name` (String) Name of the extension
- `needs_reinstall` (Boolean) Indicates if the extension is out-of-date and should be reinstalled
- `reinstall_details` (String) State details for any background reinstall operation in progress
- `state_details` (String) Additional information about the current state of the extension
- `upgrade` (String) Indicates whether a major or minor upgrade is available
- `version` (String) Version number of the extension
